message:
fix(freeze): fix append and define_array_el stack effects in opcode_emitter

- append: Fix stack layout from [arr, val] to [arr, pos, enumobj]
  The spread operator [...arr, val] uses a 3-element stack where pos
  is the current index counter. The old code was reading arr from sp-2
  which was actually the pos, causing spread to fail.

- define_array_el: Fix stack effect from sp-=2 to sp-=1
  This opcode only pops the value, keeping the index on stack for
  subsequent inc operations in array literal building. The wrong
  stack effect caused array assignment results to be lost.

These fixes enable spread syntax with for-of loops and closure assignment
to work correctly (e.g., [...path, key].join(".") now returns the
correct result).

Also:
- Add throwOutOfMemory helper to JSValue
- Make fclosure debug logging conditional with FCLOSURE_DEBUG flag
